steps.title: Spot the contrast
steps.content: The passage sets up an expectation that the spiders' spread is due to aggression, then reveals they are actually gentle giants that freeze when disturbed.

steps.title: Match the transition to the contrast
steps.content:
Instead, signals a contrast or reversal, which is exactly what the sentence needs to link the two ideas.
The other choices either add explanation, show cause‑effect, or give an example, none of which convey a contrast.
That matches choice D — D is correct.
